title: Silu Silu vendru Lyrics Vanamagan
stanzas:
Silu siluvendru poongaatru
moongilizh modha
vaasanai paatondru
kaelu kannammaa.

alai alaiyaaga aanandham
thaazhamum poda
poonguyil aataththai
paaru kannammaa

mael keezhaaga
aruvi ellaam ingu
manam vittu sirippathen
sollu kannammaa

vaanai thaangum
marangal ellaam
andha ragasiyam sollum
chella kannammaa

anbin nizhal veesudhe
inbam vilaiyaaduthe
paaraikullum paasam
ilaiyoduthe

veyil varam thoorudhe
kaade niram maarudhe
maedai indri unmai
arangaeruthe

sorgam idhuthaanammaa
maele kidaiyaathamma
sorkkal kondu sonnaalum
puriyaammaa.

Silu siluvendru poongaatru
moongilizh modha
vaasanai paatondru
kaelu kannammaa.

alai alaiyaaga aanandham
thaazhamum poda
poonguyil aataththai
paaru kannammaa

mutkal kizhithaalume
muththam adhu aagume
sogam kooda ingae
sugamaagume

vaerkal kathai koorume
kaalam nilaipaadume
deivam kooda ingae
paasiaarume

idhu naamthaanadi
maariporomadi
meendum pinnae poga
vazhi solladi.

Silu siluvendru poongaatru
moongilizh modha
vaasanai paatondru
kaelu kannammaa.

alai alaiyaaga aanandham
thaazhamum poda
poonguyil aataththai
paaru kannammaa

mael keezhaaga
aruvi ellaam ingu
manam vittu sirippathen
sollu kannammaa

vaanai thaangum
marangal ellaam
andha ragasiyam sollum
chella kannammaa

seo.title: Silu Silu vendru Lyrics Vanamagan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Silu Silu?

The song Silu Silu expresses the beauty and joy of love, using vivid imagery to convey deep emotions.

How does Silu Silu fit into the plot of Vanamagan?

This song plays during a romantic sequence, highlighting the connection between the lead characters and their feelings for each other.

Who are the artists behind Silu Silu?

The song features the talented singer Vijay Yesudas and is penned by lyricist Karky, with music composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was Silu Silu released?

Silu Silu was released on April 24, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Silu Silu, the romantic essence of love is beautifully portrayed through the lyrics and melody. The song captures the emotions of longing and joy, making it a perfect backdrop for the romantic moments in Vanamagan. With its soothing tune and heartfelt expressions, it evokes a sense of warmth and happiness. The collaboration of Vijay Yesudas's vocals and Harrish Jeyaraj's composition creates a memorable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Silu Silu from Vanamagan is a mesmerizing romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting vocals of Vijay Yesudas and the soulful lyrics by Karky, this song creates a serene atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The masterful composition by Harrish Jeyaraj adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Listen, my dear, to the fragrance of the flower that blooms softly.
Look at the joy that flows like waves, see the playful bird, my dear.
With the waterfall above and below, I smile freely, tell me, my dear.
The trees that bear the sky hold secrets, tell me, my dear.
The shadow of love brings joy, it plays in the world, but there is no attachment.
The sun brings blessings, the colors change, the truth is revealed without a stage.
This is heaven, my dear, it cannot be found above, even if spoken of, it won't be understood.
Listen, my dear, to the fragrance of the flower that blooms softly.
Look at the joy that flows like waves, see the playful bird, my dear.
Even if pearls fall, the kiss will still be there, sorrow can also be sweet here.
The stories of struggles tell the time, even the gods feel the pain here.
This is who we are, we will change, but do not tell the way to go back.
Listen, my dear, to the fragrance of the flower that blooms softly.
Look at the joy that flows like waves, see the playful bird, my dear.
With the waterfall above and below, I smile freely, tell me, my dear.
The trees that bear the sky hold secrets, tell me, my dear.
